arts.ttl: 'As bad as it's ever been' - Have Leicester reached a new low?
arts.sum: Leicester City earn unwanted record as they become the first side in Football League history to lose eight home games in a row without scoring. Just how bad is it?

arts.ttl: We look united – Eddie Howe happy to see Newcastle back ‘where they need to be’
arts.sum: The Magpies humbled relegation-haunted Leicester at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Leicester's Monga becomes second youngest PL player in blank shirt
arts.sum: Leicester City debutant Jeremy Monga had to wear a blank shirt because of his age when he became the second-youngest player in Premier League history.
Newcastle manager Eddie Howe is "really pleased" after his side's "massive" 3-0 Premier League win over Leicester at King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: What Fabian Schar did seconds after almost scoring Newcastle United wonder goal
arts.sum: Fabian Schar admits he was devastated for a split second after his audacious shot from inside his own half bounced off the crossbar at the King Power Stadium. I was pretty happy that Jacob Murphy scored the goal because it was a big moment scoring so early in first half."

arts.ttl: Leicester not good enough - Van Nistelrooy on 'difficult night'
arts.sum: Leicester manager Ruud van Nistelrooy says his side have not been "good enough" after their 3-0 defeat by Newcastle - an eighth consecutive Premier League home game without scoring.

arts.ttl: Leicester lose record 8th in a row without scoring
arts.sum: Leicester City have become the first Premier League team to lose eight Premier League games in a row without scoring a single goal.

arts.ttl: Leicester ratings v Newcastle as two bright sparks amid more defensive misery
arts.sum: The terrible form continued thanks to a woeful lack of defensive organisation and concentration, and poor play on the ball, as Jacob Murphy scored twice in the first 11 minutes before Harvey Barnes, on his first return to the King Power, capped a ruthless first half for the Champions League-chasing visitors. Conor Coady: He pinged a ball into Vardy’s feet under pressure for the second goal and while it was good intent, it perhaps wasn’t the right time to play the pass.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United next five Premier League fixtures compared to Chelsea, Man City and Aston Villa
arts.sum: Newcastle United cruised to a comfortable 3-0 win over Leicester City on Monday night and are now fifth in the Premier League table after the weekend's round of fixtures. April 13 vs Manchester United (H) at 4.30pm - Premier League

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings as star nets perfect score as Magpies breeze past Leicester City
arts.sum: The Magpies charged into an early commanding position on two minutes after Livramento crossed from the left for Jacob Murphy to apply the finish at the back post. Isak's effort fell to Joelinton who forced a save from Mads Hermansen with the ex-Leicester man slotting in from the six-yard box.
